"Hey Champ!" is a special CGTN series in which Olympic champions and participants from all disciplines are invited to visit schools and local communities in China, have some fun with sports enthusiasts, and reflect on their experience at the Games.

In this episode, CGTN speaks to 39-year-old deliveryman Luan Yushuai, who has registered to run in the upcoming Paris 2024 Marathon Pour Tous, the first-ever Olympic event open to the general public. Is he ready for Paris? How has he trained for the marathon? How does he balance work and life? Take a look!

Official data shows that 40,048 amateur runners were invited to take part in the Games, over 120 of whom are from China.
